title: hieracium cerinthoides subsp. pullatum
intro: Hieracium cerinthoides subsp. pullatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium cerinthoides subsp. pullatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
